// SpellSiphon: Reading order: every // key is documentation; real settings follow in the same order.
// Enabled: Master switch for SpellSiphon patches and behavior.
// EnableImmersiveUseHooks: Immersive item-on-item UX (Spellsiphon on magical items, charged Spellsiphon on equipment/gems) via generic use handler.
// SpellsiphonToolWcid: WCID of the Spellsiphon extraction tool (see MaxStackSize in weenie SQL / vendor stack setting).
// ManaLatticeWcid: WCID of the Mana Lattice — dedicated base for reusable buff gems.
// BaseExtractionSuccessRate: Base success rate (percent) for extraction. Default 33% to match tinkering imbue base chance.
// CharmedSmithBonus: Bonus success rate (percent) if player has Charmed Smith augment (29273).
// MitBonusPerPoint: Additional success rate per point of buffed Magic Item Tinkering skill. At 0.05% per point, 600 skill = +30%.
// MaxSuccessRate: Maximum possible success rate for extraction (hard cap).
// RareCrystalSecondarySuccessChance: Rare crystal WCIDs (RecipeHooks list): after primary extraction succeeds, roll this probability (0–1) for full success. Crafting UI chance = primary × this value (~0.03 × ~33% ≈ 1%).
// EnableAnyItemExtraction: Allow extracting spells from any spell-bearing item (not just gems). When true, Spellsiphon extraction overrides other ACE GetRecipe matches (e.g. food) so spellbook / Spell / SpellDID items still open the extraction dialog.
// AllowAttunedAndBonded: Allow extracting spells from attuned and bonded items.
// SuccessSourceSurviveChance: Chance (percent) that the source item survives intact (spells stripped) on successful extraction.
// FailureStripChance: Chance (percent) that the source item is stripped of spells but survives on failed extraction. Otherwise it is destroyed.
// ExcludeTransferSpellNameContains: Spells whose names match these substrings are not transferred to equipment. Leave empty to allow all spells.
// NegativeSpellNameContains: Spell names containing any of these substrings are treated as negative/debuff spells and removed by Spellsiphon cleansing. Leave empty to rely solely on ACE Spell.IsHarmful.
// DefaultItemMaxMana: Default maximum mana pool given to items that receive spells but previously had no mana pool.
// DefaultItemManaRegen: Mana regeneration rate (points per second) for items that receive a default mana pool. 1/30 = 0.0333.
// EnableLootgenGemMagic: Lootgen gem behavior: roll spells onto qualifying gems.
// MinSpellsOnLootgenGem: Minimum spells on a lootgen-tinkering gem.
// MaxSpellsOnLootgenGem: Maximum spells on a lootgen-tinkering gem.
// GemWcidAllowlist: If non-empty, only these WCIDs count as lootgen tinkering gems. Empty = heuristic.
// IncludeCantrips: Include cantrip-tier spells when building the spell pool.
// IncludePortalRecallSummonOnGems: Allow portal/recall/summon-class spells in the gem pool.
// IncludeSpellNameContains: If non-empty, only spells whose names contain one of these substrings are candidates.
// ExcludeSpellNameContains: Spell names containing any of these substrings are excluded from the pool.
// EnableVendorSales: When true, SpellSiphon tools and Glyphs are sold at jewelers (vendors selling jewelry/gems).
// VendorPrice: Price in pyreals for the SpellSiphon tool at vendors.
// VendorSpellsiphonStackSize: Max units per purchase for blank Spellsiphon at vendors (trade-note style; unit price = VendorPrice). Clamped to weenie MaxStackSize.
// VendorManaLatticePrice: Pyreal value per blank Mana Lattice at vendors (stackable sale uses StackUnitValue).
// VendorManaLatticeMaxBuy: Max units per purchase for blank Mana Lattice at vendors (trade-note style).
// GlyphExtractionBaseWcid: Base WCID for Glyph of Extraction tier 0 (I). Tiers 1-9 occupy +1 through +9. Range: 850210-850219.
// GlyphPrice: Base price in pyreals for tier 0 Glyph of Extraction at vendors.
// GlyphPricePerTier: Additional pyreal cost per tier above 0. Tier N price = GlyphPrice + N * GlyphPricePerTier.
// VendorGlyphStackSize: Max units per purchase for blank Glyph of Extraction at vendors (trade-note style). Clamped to weenie MaxStackSize.
